Title: Verify user registration
Test Data: Valid username, password, email, and admin status
Test Steps:
1. User enters valid credentials and clicks "Login"
2. Application sends a request to the database to check user registration
3. Database responds with registration status
4. Application displays the homepage
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the homepage.

Title: Verify user registration failure
Test Data: Invalid username, password, email, or admin status
Test Steps:
1. User enters invalid credentials and clicks "Login"
2. Application sends a request to the database to check user registration
3. Database responds with registration failure
4. Application displays an error message
Expected Result: User is not logged in, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Modify user data
Test Data: Valid new username, password, email, and admin status
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the settings page
2. User enters new credentials and clicks "Save"
3. Application sends a request to the database to update user data
4. Database updates user data and confirms the update
5. Application displays a success message
Expected Result: User data is successfully updated, and a success message is displayed.

Title: Modify user data failure
Test Data: Invalid new username, password, email, or admin status
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the settings page
2. User enters invalid credentials and clicks "Save"
3. Application sends a request to the database to update user data
4. Database fails to update user data
5. Application displays an error message
Expected Result: User data is not updated, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Add new production data
Test Data: Valid ID, user, model, production footprint, total footprint, material formula, deposition, percentage presence, carbon footprint
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the production tracking page
2. User enters valid production data and clicks "Save"
3. Application sends a request to the database to add new production data
4. Database adds new production data and confirms the addition
5. Application displays a success message
Expected Result: New production data is successfully added, and a success message is displayed.

Title: Add new production data failure
Test Data: Invalid ID, user, model, production footprint, total footprint, material formula, deposition, percentage presence, carbon footprint
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the production tracking page
2. User enters invalid production data and clicks "Save"
3. Application sends a request to the database to add new production data
4. Database fails to add new production data
5. Application displays an error message
Expected Result: New production data is not added, and an error message is displayed.

Title: Device scanning
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a device scan
2. Application performs a hardware scan
3. Application calculates component health and speed
4. Application calculates life expectancy
5. Application returns the result
Expected Result: Device scan is successful, and the result is returned.

Title: Device scanning failure
Test Steps:
1. User initiates a device scan
2. Application performs a hardware scan
3. Application calculates component health and speed
4. Application calculates life expectancy
5. Application returns the result
Expected Result: Device scan is unsuccessful, and the result is returned.

Title: Calculate replacement cost
Preconditions: Device scan is successful, and some components are defective
Test Steps: 1. Application calculates the cost of replacement if components are defective
Expected Result: The cost of replacement is calculated correctly.

Title: Calculate replacement cost failure
Preconditions: Device scan is successful, but no components are defective
Test Steps: 1. Application calculates the cost of replacement if components are defective
Expected Result: The cost of replacement is 0, as no components are defective.
